intro: Rinorea brandtii, also known as "Kadoko" or "Katoko", is a plant species in the family Violaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Rinorea brandtii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
